== Notes for [[Item:Q99658|Q99658]] ==

Little is known, however we do know that Yakob is the son of Sa'adyah (Mar Sutra II). He has two (2) sons

1) Shlomo ben Zakai (Migas) and

2) Shemaiyah
--------------------

[http://he.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D7%9E%D7%A8_%D7%96%D7%95%D7%98%D7%A8%D7%90_%D7%91%D7%A8_%D7%9E%D7%A8_%D7%96%D7%95%D7%98%D7%A8%D7%90 '''מר זוטרא''' '''השלישי''']

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD71533D1EFBBFA9822EF79916C396D
geni:6000000014633066213

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
